brand_dna.category: Natural sea salt-based healing mouthwash for daily oral care and post-procedure recovery.
brand_dna.core_belief: That nature can heal and protect - bringing the ocean's healing power to homes everywhere through hand-harvested Red Sea salt.
proof_points: World's first and only patented sea salt based mouthwash
Made with unrefined, hand-harvested Red Sea salt with over 82 trace minerals
Alcohol-free, fluoride-free, sugar-free, no dyes or artificial additives; safe to swallow
Over 20 years in natural oral care, clinically studied and professionally recommended
brand_dna.positioning: A premium, natural alternative to harsh alcohol-based mouthwashes - the original patented sea salt rinse for healing and daily use.

voice_pillars.name: Healing-Focused
voice_pillars.desc: Leads with recovery and relief - framing the product as a soothing solution, not just fresh breath.
voice_pillars.quote: More than just a mouthwash - it's a natural solution for everyday oral care.

voice_pillars.name: Nature-Powered
voice_pillars.desc: Grounds every benefit in natural ingredients and the ocean's minerals rather than chemicals.
voice_pillars.quote: We believe in the power of nature to heal and protect.

voice_pillars.name: Clinically Credible
voice_pillars.desc: Backs claims with patents, studies, and professional trust to reassure cautious buyers.
voice_pillars.quote: Clinically studied and professionally recommended, it's highly effective and safe for all ages.

voice_pillars.name: Gentle & Inclusive
voice_pillars.desc: Reassures that the formula is safe and non-irritating for everyone, including children.
voice_pillars.quote: Gentle & Safe: Alcohol-free, non-irritating, and perfect for dry mouth or sensitive gums.

phrases: the only thing that helped my tongue piercing heal
left my mouth feeling mildly stimulated
Great product to have on hand

icp: Health-conscious adults recovering from dental work, piercings, or oral irritation who want a gentle, natural, non-burning rinse they can trust for the whole family.

personas.name: Post-Procedure Healer
personas.description: Recovering from dental surgery, canker sores, or a piercing and moved by fast, gentle relief without the sting of alcohol.

personas.name: Natural-First Parent
personas.description: Avoids alcohol, fluoride, and dyes for the family and buys on the promise that it's safe for all ages and safe to swallow.

personas.name: Sensitive-Mouth Sufferer
personas.description: Deals with dry mouth, sore throats, or chemo-related irritation and responds to the soothing, non-irritating positioning.

offers: Email subscribe to be first to hear about sales and new offerings

allowed.claim: The world's first and only patented sea salt based mouthwash
Alcohol-free, fluoride-free, sugar-free, and made with only natural ingredients
Made with over 82 trace minerals from hand-harvested Red Sea salt
Safe for daily use and for all ages, and safe to swallow
Xylitol's low glycemic index makes it diabetic safe

banned.claim: Unqualified 'eco-friendly' or 'sustainably sourced' as used on the homepage and about page
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - unqualified sustainability claims need specific, verifiable backing

banned.claim: 'Made using natural, eco-friendly processes' without evidence
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - vague green process claim not substantiated

banned.claim: 'Zero impact', 'carbon neutral', or '100% sustainable' packaging or sourcing
banned.why: FTC Green Guides - banned without specific, verifiable proof

banned.claim: 'Cures', 'fixes', or 'corrects' canker sores, gum disease, or infections
banned.why: Medical/treatment claim - go no further than the site's supported soothe/relieve/promotes-healing language

banned.claim: 'Prevents cancer' or treats chemo side effects as a medical outcome
banned.why: Unsupported medical claim - keep to 'therapeutic rinse' language already on site, not a cure
